title: Services & Extras
description: Create and manage additional services that can be added to reservations, such as airport transfers, spa treatments, or special requests.

access_denied.title: Access Denied
access_denied.description: You do not have permission to manage services and extras. Please contact an administrator.

table.title: Available Services
table.description: List of all services configured for your property.
table.empty_state: No services have been created yet.

add_modal.title: Add New Service
add_modal.description: Define the service details. Click save when you're done.

edit_modal.title: Edit Service
edit_modal.description: Update the details for this service.

delete_alert.title: Are you sure?
delete_alert.description: This will permanently delete the service '{{name}}'. This action cannot be undone.

toasts.permission_denied: You don't have permission to perform this action.
toasts.name_price_required: Service Name and Price are required.
